description_long: This hotel complex features a series of modern, detached villa-style units arranged in two parallel rows, each with direct access to narrow blue-tiled pools running along their fronts. At the center of the property is a large rectangular swimming pool, surrounded by manicured lawns, palm trees, and paved walkways. The main building, which likely houses the lobby and amenities, is situated at the far end of the pool and is flanked by additional structures, possibly for dining or events. The grounds are enclosed by a brick perimeter wall, and the landscaping includes clusters of trees and open green spaces. The architectural style is contemporary, with clean lines, flat roofs, and a focus on symmetry and outdoor leisure. The overall layout suggests a resort-like atmosphere, prioritizing privacy, relaxation, and access to water features.
description: A modern hotel complex with villa-style units, central pool, landscaped grounds, and contemporary architecture.
description_view_0: Front view showing two rows of villa units, each with pool access, and the main pool and central building in the background.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the row arrangement of villas, the central pool, and the main building with adjacent green space.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the main building, central pool, and the symmetrical layout of the villa units beyond.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the villa rows, the central pool, and the landscaped areas surrounding the main structures.
